name: extraction_tricky_cases
description: High-ambiguity edge cases aimed at exposing canonicalization gaps, domain-conditioned preferences, and memory-vs-noise boundary errors.

cases.description: terse is still a short-answer preference
cases.input:
User: Keep replies terse.
Assistant: Sure.

cases.description: list preference may be paraphrased without the phrase bullet points
cases.input:
User: Lists work better than paragraphs for me.
Assistant: Noted.

cases.description: 中文偏好可被意译为简洁和列点
cases.input:
User: 回复别太展开，给我列点就行。
Assistant: 明白。

cases.description: negative preference update should preserve current non-coffee state
cases.input:
User: I don't drink coffee anymore; now I drink tea.
Assistant: Understood.

cases.description: 中文否定更新应保留当前状态
cases.input:
User: 我不喝咖啡了，现在只喝茶。
Assistant: 好的。

cases.description: mixed troubleshooting and stable stack should keep only the stable stack
cases.input:
User: I've been debugging a flaky deploy all day, but I usually write Go and Python.
Assistant: Makes sense.

cases.description: 中文排障过程夹带稳定技术栈时应只保留稳定信息
cases.input:
User: 我最近在排查数据库超时，不过平时主要写Go和Python。
Assistant: 继续看日志吧。

cases.description: quoted assistant advice should not become the user's preference
cases.input:
User: You said bullet points help, but for me concise answers are enough.
Assistant: Noted.

cases.description: multi-turn event and cadence with paraphrased duration
cases.input:
User: I started learning guitar recently.
Assistant: Nice.
User: I practice every evening for about an hour.
Assistant: Keep it up.

cases.description: habit and time preference across turns with schedule wording
cases.input:
User: I write best in the morning.
Assistant: Nice.
User: I usually block 8am to 10am for deep work.
Assistant: Great.

cases.description: diet change should keep old and new state
cases.input:
User: I used to be vegetarian, but now I eat fish again.
Assistant: Understood.

cases.description: domain-conditioned preferences should not collapse into one generic preference
cases.input:
User: I keep work notes short, but for journaling I prefer long paragraphs.
Assistant: Got it.

cases.description: current fact plus nested hypothetical should keep only the current state
cases.input:
User: Right now I live in Hangzhou, and if I ever switch cities, maybe Singapore.
Assistant: Understood.
